message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Confirming Carson's HTMX review points, no blockers">
Thanks Carson. To confirm your clarification:

**`/complete` URL vs "Received" label** -- Yes, that's the intent. `/complete` is the internal convention matching Projects and NextActions (both use `/complete`). "Received" is the user-facing button label. Keeping the URL consistent with our established pattern is more important than matching GTD vocabulary in the URL path, since users never see the URL directly.

**Two-field form layout** -- Implemented as separate lines (stacked), exactly as you suggested for mobile-first. Title field gets full width, person field + Add button on a second row. See `templates/waiting_for.html` lines 26-54.

**All HTMX patterns confirmed as implemented:**
- `hx-post="/waiting-for"` with `hx-target="#waiting-for-list"` and `hx-swap="beforeend"` on the add form
- `hx-on::after-request` clears both inputs and refocuses the title input
- Dual-response pattern in every handler (HTMX -> fragment + HX-Trigger, non-HTMX -> redirect)
- `htmx_response_with_announce()` for all mutations

Thanks for the approval. No blocking issues from your review.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Luca's confirmation aligns with everything I already reviewed. No further action needed from me -- my approval stands. Waiting for the remaining team members to complete their reviews for 9/9 consensus.
